name: Orbit — Bookmarks, Tasks & Now Playing
description: A calm new-tab dashboard with bookmarks, tasks, sticky notes, custom wallpapers, and a now-playing widget.
author: Orbit

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://images.unsplash.com https://www.google.com https://*.gstatic.com; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://images.unsplash.com
